title: Tableau Calendar Extension: A Native Full-Year Heatmap Date Picker
overview: A native full-year circular heatmap date picker built with React, TypeScript, and Vite on the Extensions API to drive interactive, two-way filters.
challenge: Native Tableau date filters are limited to relative date sliders and standard dropdown lists, which lack high-density visual heatmap feedback across full calendar years.
solution: Built a custom Tableau extension in React and D3 that renders interactive 365-day heatmaps and binds parameter updates back to the active worksheet.
archExplanation: React component listens to mark selection events via the Extensions API and pushes target date range parameter modifications back to Tableau Server.
impact: 100% native integration into Tableau Server dashboards
Enabled multi-date range comparative analysis for retail finance teams
learnings: State updates must throttle parameter calls to avoid Tableau layout render locks
Vite bundling minimizes extension load footprint
